features: NAIL BUFFER – Easy to use 4 Sided buffing block for nails. 4 simple steps for the perfect manicure.
NAIL FILE - Side 1 is designed to file and shape the nail. Gently file the nail into the desired shape.
REMOVES RIDGES – gently smooths and removes ridges from the nail. Side 2 removes ridges and side 3 leaves a finer finish.
BUFFS - creates a high gloss shine to the nails in seconds. Side 4 buffs to leave nails shiny.
3 PACKS - Includes 3 individually packed buffing blocks. Perfect for keeping one at home, office and travel.
MANICARE - part of an extensive beauty accessories range from Manicare. Manicare offers a comprehensive range with everything needed for a perfect head to toe pamper.
description: Product Description The Manicare 4 way buffing block is a must have for your manicure set. It is easy to hold and easy to use so that creating your perfect manicure is simple. Each side is numbered to shape, smooth and gloss the nail is 4 easy steps. Step 1 – Use side 1 to shape the nail into your desired style. Gently file each nail from the outside edge to the centre. Always file nails in one direction, never back and forth as this will damage the nail. Step 2 – Use side 2 to smooth ridges. Gently sweep the top of the nail to smooth and rid the nail of uneven ridges. Step 3 – Follow step 2 and use side 3 for a finer finish and sheen to the nails. Step 4 – Side 4 of the buffing block is the final step and creates and instant high gloss shine in seconds. The Manicare buffing block is designed to use frequently to maintain healthy nails. It can be used on natural nails before or after polish. Use on bare, nude nails to create a natural, shiny and healthy look. Can also be used to brighten up dull nail polish and create a shine to any colour. Manicare has been manufacturing high quality beauty and hair accessories for over 35 years. Manicare offers a comprehensive range of products with everything you need for the perfect head-to-toe pamper. Each product and category has been carefully designed and selected to offer all the latest beauty must haves. Whether you want to perfect your make-up application, create a salon finish manicure or indulge in a relaxing pedicure - the Manicare collection has all the essential tools you will need. Manicare is renowned for quality and is proud to offer a 100% guarantee on all of its products. Directions 1. Use side 1 to shape the nail into your desired style. Gently file each nail from the outside edge to the centre. Always file nails in one direction, never back and forth as this will damage the nail. 2. Use side 2 to smooth ridges. Gently sweep the top of the nail to smooth and rid the nail of uneven ridges. 3. Follow step 2 and use side 3 for a finer finish and sheen to the nails. 4. Side 4 of the buffing block is the final step and creates an instant high gloss shine in seconds. Safety Warning FOR EXTERNAL USE ONLY. See more
